name: i-see-you-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the i-see-you plugin: give a coding agent eyes — capture and analyze a photo from the local webcam via ffmpeg, on Linux, macOS, or Windows.

plugins.name: i-see-you
plugins.description: Let the agent open its eyes: capture a photo from the local webcam with ffmpeg, then view and analyze it. Cross-platform (Linux/macOS/Windows). Triggers on '看看我', 'take a photo', 'selfie', '拍照', '看看现在的环境'.
